description_long: This is a rectangular mattress with a soft, fabric-covered surface and a slightly rumpled appearance, suggesting it has been used or is made to look inviting. The mattress is topped with a darker, wide band or runner that stretches across its width, adding a visual accent and possibly serving as a decorative or functional element. The main body of the mattress is a medium gray color, while the runner is a much darker shade, creating a clear contrast. The sides of the mattress are smooth, with subtle creases and folds in the fabric, indicating a textile cover. There are no visible brand labels, tags, or stickers on any side, and the surface appears clean and free of stains. The edges are softly rounded, with no prominent piping or border trim visible.
description: A soft, gray mattress with a dark accent runner and a fabric-covered, slightly rumpled surface. The design is simple, clean, and free of visible labels or stains.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the mattress with the dark runner draped across the near edge and subtle fabric folds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the dark runner on top, and the smooth, fabric-covered side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, uninterrupted gray surface of the mattress without the runner visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mattress thickness and the dark runner, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_pattern_design: Plain fabric with subtle, natural folds and a contrasting dark runner; no visible motifs or geometric patterns.
attribute_edge_piping: No visible edge piping or border trim; edges are softly rounded and covered in the same fabric as the main surface.
